author: lOrm
content: Fixed in commit a13c4bed on branch fix-688-acp-rce-2513545. Replaced shell-string interpolation with argv-based tokio::process::Command::new(program).args(...). find/rg resolved to absolute paths via PATH walk. User pattern passed after -- argv terminator; type/glob args reject leading - to block flag injection. 4 new security tests in mod search_security_tests prove metacharacters become literal argv entries, rg is absolute-path-resolved, and -prefixed patterns land after the -- terminator. Tests: 4/4 PASS, cargo clippy -D warnings: exit 0, 1412 baseline + 4 = 1416 lib tests. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore].
